description_long: This is a human adult figure depicted in a dynamic walking pose, with one leg forward and the other back, suggesting motion. The figure is dressed in a fitted, long-sleeve top and slim pants, with the clothing closely following the contours of the body. The arms are bent at the elbows, with one arm slightly forward and the other back, complementing the walking motion. The figure wears low-profile shoes that appear to be athletic or casual in style. The head is upright, and the overall build is slender and proportional, typical of an adult pedestrian. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the surface appears smooth and uniform.
description: A slender adult figure in a walking pose, dressed in fitted long-sleeve top and slim pants, with low-profile shoes and no visible accessories.
description_view_0: The figure is seen from a front-left angle, showing the left leg forward and the right arm slightly back, with the head and torso facing ahead.
description_view_1: This right-front view highlights the right leg and arm, with the left leg trailing and the body posture emphasizing forward motion.
description_view_2: From the right-rear angle, the back of the figure is visible, showing the right leg extended back and the left arm swinging forward.
description_view_3: The left-rear view displays the back of the figure, with the left leg extended back and the right arm swinging forward, emphasizing the walking stride.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted long-sleeve top and slim pants
